description: List of men's names, possibly recipients of alms. Hand of Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya? Names include: [Sal]āma b. [...]; Muslim b. Ḥarbash; Moshe b. Shuʿayb; [...] Ibn al-Khaṭṭāṭ; Abū l-Ḥasan b. ʿEzra; Abū Isḥāq Avraham he-Ḥaver; Abū Naṣr and Naḥum; Salāma b. al-[...]; Yosef [...]; Khalfa [...]; Ismāʿīl Fārizī; Yosef b. al-[...]; Ghālib b. Moshe; Avraham al-Maghribī; Abū Naṣr [...]; Salmān; Abū l-Faraj and Abū ʿAlī Ibn al-Shofeṭ; Abū Saʿīd b. [...] and his friend Avraham; Abū l-Ḥasan ʿAllūn al-Ṣahrashtī and his brother; Avraham b. [...] al-Abzārī; Ḥusayn al-Abzārī; Ghulayb al-Labbān; Abū Saʿīd [...]
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
